name: Telegram-Drive
description: Turn your Telegram account into an unlimited, secure cloud storage drive. an Open-source desktop app built with Tauri, Rust, and React.
readme_summary: Telegram Drive is an open-source desktop application that transforms your Telegram account into a secure, unlimited cloud storage solution. It provides a familiar file explorer interface for managing files directly on Telegram's servers using its API.
primary_use_case: To provide users with a free, unlimited, and secure cloud storage solution by leveraging their existing Telegram accounts.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, modern filing cabinet where each drawer is a Telegram chat bubble. A user is effortlessly placing digital files (represented as glowing icons) into the chat bubble drawers, which then seamlessly organize themselves. Subtle data streams flow from the user's computer (visible in the corner) into the cabinet. The overall scene is clean, bright, and futuristic, with a hint of the Telegram app's blue color palette. The repository name 'Telegram Drive' is subtly integrated into the cabinet's design. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and intuitive visual metaphor.

name: hyperframes
description: Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.
readme_summary: Hyperframes is an open-source video rendering framework that allows users to create video compositions using HTML and CSS. It integrates with AI agents to facilitate the creation process, enabling users to describe desired videos and have the AI generate the HTML/CSS code for rendering.
key_features: Integration with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex)
AI agent skills for generating compositions and animations
primary_use_case: To enable AI agents and developers to easily create and render video content using HTML and CSS, streamlining the video production workflow.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artisan, akin to a master weaver, sits at a futuristic loom. Instead of threads, they are weaving glowing lines of HTML and CSS code. These lines are being intricately woven into a dynamic, animated video scene displayed on a large, holographic screen in front of them. On one side of the loom, raw code snippets are fed in, and on the other, the finished video seamlessly emerges. Subtle particles of light and small UI elements representing AI assistance float around the artisan, signifying the 'Hyperframes' framework. The scene is set in a clean, modern studio with soft, ambient lighting, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, yet clear color palette.

name: everything-ai-ml
description: A curated collection of learning resources for Generative AI, Machine Learning, Agentic AI, LLMs, RAG, Fine-tuning, MLOps, and more.
readme_summary: This repository is a comprehensive, curated collection of learning resources for Generative AI, Machine Learning, and related advanced topics. It serves as a central hub for individuals looking to deepen their understanding and skills in these rapidly evolving fields, offering a structured path from foundational concepts to advanced applications.
key_features: Covers Generative AI, Machine Learning, Agentic AI, LLMs, RAG, Fine-tuning, MLOps
Includes resources on key concepts, building blocks, roadmaps, frameworks, tools, courses, books, research papers, and communities
primary_use_case: To provide a structured and comprehensive collection of learning materials for individuals interested in mastering Generative AI and Machine Learning.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian in a vast, futuristic library, meticulously organizing glowing books and scrolls that represent different AI and ML concepts. The librarian is pointing to a central, illuminated pathway labeled 'AI/ML Roadmap', guiding a curious student towards advanced sections like 'Generative AI' and 'Agentic AI'. Subtle digital particles representing data flow around the shelves, and small holographic screens display code snippets and visualizations. The scene is bathed in a soft, ethereal light, emphasizing knowledge and discovery. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a vibrant, yet organized, color palette, with the repository name 'Everything AI/ML' subtly integrated into a library sign.

name: omniget
description: Open source desktop app for studying online courses and books on your computer. Watch Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify courses with timestamped notes, spaced repetition flashcards and a focus timer. Read PDFs and EPUBs with highlights, bookmarks and a focus mode. Also downloads YouTube, Instagram, TikTok and torrents.
readme_summary: OmniGet is an open-source desktop application designed for efficient online learning and content consumption. It allows users to download courses from various platforms and read digital books (PDF, EPUB) within the app, offering features like timestamped notes, flashcards, and focus modes to enhance studying. Additionally, it supports downloading videos from social media and torrents.
key_features: Download and watch online courses (Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify, etc.)
Read PDFs and EPUBs with highlights, bookmarks, and focus mode
Timestamped notes linked to video playback
Download videos from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok
primary_use_case: To provide a unified desktop environment for downloading and studying online courses and digital books, enhancing the learning experience with integrated study tools and content management.
cover_image_prompt: A wise owl wearing spectacles sits at a large, open book that seamlessly transforms into a glowing screen displaying a video lecture. From the book's pages, digital streams of data flow into organized folders labeled 'Courses' and 'Books'. Around the owl, floating elements represent flashcards with glowing question marks and small, stylized icons for video playback and PDF reading. The background is a cozy, modern study with soft lighting. Subtle UI elements of the OmniGet app are visible on the screen. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, inviting aesthetic and a color palette of warm blues and greens, emphasizing knowledge acquisition and organized learning.
